name: Automatically Apply Discounts to Customers
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set a permanent fixed percentage discount on the customer card"}], "data-id": "set-a-permanent-fixed-percentage-discount-on-the-customer-card"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can define a set percentage off discount amount per customer that automatically applies to a customers order. This discount percentage will be in addition to any other discounts and will apply to all products."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto by Maropost control panel\u00a0navigate to "}, {"text": "Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Customers & prospects", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search for the customer and open the customer card"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Payment Details", "bold": true}, {"text": " ;tab."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a discount percentage amount in the "}, {"text": "Default Discount Percentage", "bold": true}, {"text": " field."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": This discount will only be applied if the customer is logged in. In this example, the customer will receive 10% off all prices site-wide."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save ", "bold": true}, {"text": "the changes."}]}]}]}]
